hero.subtitle: Finance student, active investor on the Casablanca Stock Exchange since November 2024. I launched WallStreet Morocco to democratize investing in Morocco and prove that real wealth can be built from just $100/month.

quote.text: Investing is not a privilege reserved for the wealthy. With $100 a month and a rigorous stock selection, any Moroccan can build lasting wealth.
quote.author: — El Hanafi Mohammed, Founder of WallStreet Morocco

2022.title: Discovering financial markets
2022.desc: First encounter with the Casablanca Stock Exchange and international markets. Beginning of intensive learning: fundamental analysis, portfolio management, Moroccan economy.

2023.title: Academic finance training
2023.desc: Specialized studies in capital markets focusing on Moroccan securities — banking, telecom, agri-food. Building a rigorous analytical framework.

2024.title: Action — Real DCA
2024.desc: November 2024: first $100 investment at the BVC. Start of rigorous and transparent monthly tracking. Targeted selection of the most promising listed stocks.

2025.title: Launching WallStreet Morocco
2025.desc: Launching the platform with a clear mission: democratize investing in Morocco. Simulation tools, financial education, official OPCVM data, full transparency.

2026.title: +51% — Results speak for themselves
2026.desc: March 2026: $1,700 invested → $2,628. +54.6% return over 17 months through rigorous selection and perfect positioning on the BVC run-up. The method is proven.

vision.title: Why WallStreet Morocco?
vision.subtitle: The Casablanca Stock Exchange remains underutilized by individual Moroccan investors. This platform exists to change that.

simplify.title: Simplify investing in Morocco
simplify.body: The BVC remains underinvested by individuals. Our platform removes entry barriers: clear data, accessible tools, structured educational path.

method.title: Invest with method, not luck
method.body: Rigorous stock selection, DCA discipline, understanding market cycles. These are the elements that produced +51% — not luck.

proof.title: Prove by example
proof.body: Every month, data is updated. The portfolio is documented in real time. Transparency is our differentiator.

education.title: Financial Education
education.desc: Making financial knowledge accessible to all Moroccans, regardless of their starting level.

longTerm.title: Long-Term Investing
longTerm.desc: Promoting a culture of patient and disciplined investing, aligned with the realities of the Moroccan market.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.desc: Sharing my own investor journey — gains and challenges — without filters or staging.

community.title: Active Community
community.desc: Building a community of Moroccan investors who learn and grow together.

cta.title: Start your own journey
cta.subtitle: Simulate what $100/month can earn you on the Casablanca Stock Exchange. The tools are free. The method is proven.
